banner_matchers.value: ^<\?xml version=\"1\.0\".*<!DOCTYPE GANGLIA_XML.*<GANGLIA_XML VERSION=\"([^\"]+)\" SOURCE=\"([^\"]+)\">.*<CLUSTER NAME=\"([^\"]+)\" LOCALTIME=\"\d+\" OWNER=\"([^\"]+)\"

^<\?xml version="1\.0".*<!DOCTYPE GANGLIA_XML \[
   <!ELEMENT GANGLIA_XML \(GRID\x7cCLUSTER\x7cHOST\)\*>
      <!ATTLIST GANGLIA_XML VERSION CDATA #REQUIRED>
